wafregional.regexpatternset.Name.Docs: A friendly name or description of the [AWS::WAFRegional::RegexPatternSet](#aws-resource-wafregional-regexpatternset). You can't change `Name` after you create a `RegexPatternSet`.

wafregional.regexpatternset.RegexPattern.Docs: Specifies the regular expression (regex) patterns that you want AWS WAF to search for, such as `B[a@]dB[o0]t`.
